data.body: f25e completion-verifier FAILED: AC2 literally requires documenting sign(kind,body) which my docs deliberately omitted (unified sign deferred per ADR). Remediated by adding a 'Signing an attestation for a kind (sign(kind,body))' section to docs/attest-substrate.md documenting the sign flow + why it's assembled from the kind's scheme signer. Amended 535 (6a8cd11a5, Change-Id kept), re-pushed. 9fd5/518b/7e53/56d9 already CLOSED+signed (both attestations). Awaiting 535 re-vote before re-closing f25e.
